description.content: Lists Apigee organizations accessible to the caller.
Gets the profile for an Apigee organization.
Lists API proxies in an organization.

item.name: Google Apigee Create an API proxy

request.name: Google Apigee Create an API proxy

description.content: Creates an API proxy in an organization.

item.name: Google Apigee Get an API proxy

request.name: Google Apigee Get an API proxy

description.content: Gets an API proxy including its revisions.

item.name: Google Apigee Delete an API proxy

request.name: Google Apigee Delete an API proxy

description.content: Deletes an API proxy and all its revisions.
Creates an environment in an organization.
Gets the profile for an environment.
Deletes an environment from an organization.
Gets the deployment status of an API proxy revision.
Lists API products in an organization.

item.name: Google Apigee Create an API product

request.name: Google Apigee Create an API product

description.content: Creates an API product in an organization.
Creates a developer in an organization.

The Apigee API enables full lifecycle API management including creating and deploying API proxies, managing organizations and environments, configuring API products, and monitoring API analytics.
